description_long: This is a two-story commercial copy shop or print shop with a boxy, modern design and a flat roof. The facade features a mix of gray and blue panels, with several windows and a prominent entrance at street level. There are visible signage elements, including a neon-style sign and a digital display, as well as a small awning above the main door. The building sits on a sidewalk with a marked yellow line, suggesting an urban street setting. The side and rear views show minimal detailing, with the majority of architectural features concentrated on the front. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with some metal and glass elements.
description: A modern, boxy two-story copy shop with gray and blue panels, prominent signage, and a flat roof, set on an urban sidewalk.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, multiple windows, signage, and a sidewalk with a yellow line.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals a circular window, a small awning, and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_2: The rear view is plain, with no windows or doors, emphasizing the building's rectangular form.
description_view_3: The left side view shows a few small features and utility boxes, but is otherwise unadorned.
attribute_signage: There is a neon-style sign with stylized text on the upper right of the facade, a digital display above the entrance, and a vertical illuminated sign on the right side of the front wall.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, characterized by a flat roof, clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a combination of concrete, glass, and metal elements.
